moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running from Thursday, July 16th to Sunday, July 19th.

angles.name: Main Event Kick-off
angles.copy: Golf's biggest major is almost here! The 154th Open Championship kicks off this Thursday at Royal Birkdale. Who are you backing for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Local Buzz
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale in Southport is set to host The Open Championship from Thursday! Get ready for some world-class golf right here in the North West. Anyone heading down?

moments.title: Tour de France Continues
moments.blurb: The 113th edition of the Tour de France is well underway, having started on July 4th in Barcelona and continuing until July 26th.

angles.name: Daily Update
angles.copy: The Tour de France keeps rolling! Who's impressing you in the peloton so far? Catch up on all the action from today's stage.

angles.name: General Interest
angles.copy: Beyond the cycling, the Tour de France is a stunning tour of Europe! What's been your favourite scenery shot from this year's race?

moments.title: Hebridean Celtic Festival Underway
moments.blurb: The Hebridean Celtic Festival runs from July 15th to 18th in Stornoway, Outer Hebrides, Scotland, celebrating traditional and contemporary Celtic music.

angles.name: Festival Start
angles.copy: Get ready for some incredible music! The Hebridean Celtic Festival kicks off tomorrow in Stornoway. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Scottish Culture
angles.copy: It's all about the music and culture in the Outer Hebrides this week! The Hebridean Celtic Festival brings together the best in traditional and modern Celtic sounds. Slàinte Mhath!

moments.title: Splendour Festival in Nottingham
moments.blurb: Splendour Festival, Nottinghamshire's biggest festival, takes place from July 18th to 19th at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park.

angles.name: Weekend Festival
angles.copy: Nottingham, get ready! Splendour Festival is happening this weekend at Wollaton Hall & Deer Park. Who's on your must-see list?

angles.name: Music & Location
angles.copy: Live music in a deer park? Yes please! Splendour Festival kicks off Saturday in Nottingham. Perfect summer vibes guaranteed.

moments.title: BBC Proms Season Begins
moments.blurb: The world's biggest classical music festival, The BBC Proms, returns to the Royal Albert Hall in London from July 17th, running until September 12th.

angles.name: Classical Season
angles.copy: The iconic BBC Proms season begins this Thursday at the Royal Albert Hall! Eight weeks of incredible classical music await. Will you be Promenade-ing?

angles.name: London Culture
angles.copy: London's summer of culture continues as the BBC Proms kicks off this week. Immerse yourself in the world of classical music at the Royal Albert Hall!

moments.title: Latitude Festival Celebrates 20 Years
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival, celebrating its 20th anniversary, takes place at Henham Park, Southwold, Suffolk from July 23rd to 26th.

angles.name: 20th Anniversary
angles.copy: Happy 20th Anniversary, Latitude! The festival returns to Henham Park next week, July 23-26. Who's heading to Suffolk for the celebrations?

angles.name: Suffolk Festival
angles.copy: It's almost time! Latitude Festival is back at Henham Park next week for its 20th year. Get ready for a weekend of music, arts, and good times in Suffolk!

moments.title: Truck Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Truck Festival brings its indie-fueled spirit to Hill Farm, Steventon, Oxfordshire from July 23rd to 26th.

angles.name: Indie Festival
angles.copy: Truck Festival is almost here! Next week, Hill Farm in Oxfordshire lights up with indie music from July 23-26. Who's got their tickets?

angles.name: Summer Vibes
angles.copy: Ready for a weekend in the fields? Truck Festival promises a massive lineup and great vibes in Oxfordshire next week!

moments.title: Together Again Festival at Bolesworth Castle
moments.blurb: Together Again Festival returns to Bolesworth Castle in Cheshire from July 24th to 26th, offering music, arts, and a family-friendly atmosphere.

angles.name: Cheshire Festival
angles.copy: Cheshire, get ready! Together Again Festival is back at Bolesworth Castle next weekend, July 24-26. Fun for the whole family!

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: Looking for a family festival? Together Again at Bolesworth Castle next weekend has world-class music, vibrant arenas, and free entry for kids! Who's coming?

moments.title: Official UK Singles Chart Update
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart is typically updated on Fridays, with the latest chart reflecting the most popular tracks in the country.

angles.name: New Chart Friday
angles.copy: It's almost Friday, which means a new Official UK Singles Chart is on its way! What tracks do you think will be climbing the Top 40 this week?

angles.name: Chart Toppers Discussion
angles.copy: Who's dominating the airwaves and streams right now? Let us know your favourite tracks from the current Official UK Singles Chart!

moments.title: New TV & Streaming Hits This July
moments.blurb: July brings a wave of new shows and films to UK streaming platforms, including 'Elle', 'Little House on the Prairie', 'The Dark', and 'Ann Droid'.

angles.name: What To Watch
angles.copy: Struggling to pick your next binge-watch? July's streaming lineup is packed! From 'Elle' to 'Little House on the Prairie' and 'The Dark', what's caught your eye?

angles.name: Weekend Watchlist
angles.copy: Your weekend watchlist just got longer! New shows like 'Ann Droid' and 'Dan Brown's The Lost Symbol' are out now. What are you diving into?

moments.title: Happy 39th Birthday, Dan Reynolds!
moments.blurb: Dan Reynolds, the frontman of Imagine Dragons, turns 39 today, July 14th.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Sending big birthday wishes to Imagine Dragons frontman, Dan Reynolds, who turns 39 today! What's your favourite Imagine Dragons track?

angles.name: Artist Focus
angles.copy: From 'Radioactive' to 'Believer', Dan Reynolds has given us some massive anthems. Happy 39th Birthday to the voice of Imagine Dragons!

moments.title: Happy 66th Birthday, Kyle Gass!
moments.blurb: Kyle Gass, co-founder of the comedy rock band Tenacious D, celebrates his 66th birthday today, July 14th.

angles.name: Rock Birthday
angles.copy: Raise your horns! It's Kyle Gass's 66th birthday today! What's your favourite Tenacious D moment or song?

angles.name: Tenacious D Tribute
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the other half of Tenacious D, Kyle Gass! Get your air guitar ready to celebrate!

moments.title: Happy 40th Birthday, Dan Smith!
moments.blurb: Dan Smith, lead singer of the British band Bastille, turns 40 today, July 14th.

angles.name: Bastille Birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating 40 years of Dan Smith today! Happy Birthday to the voice behind Bastille's biggest hits like 'Pompeii'. What's your favourite?

angles.name: British Music
angles.copy: A huge Happy 40th Birthday to Bastille's very own Dan Smith! What's the Bastille song that always gets you singing along?

moments.title: Happy 80th Birthday, Linda Ronstadt!
moments.blurb: Legendary singer Linda Ronstadt celebrates her 80th birthday tomorrow, July 15th.

angles.name: Music Icon Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 80th Birthday to the incredible Linda Ronstadt tomorrow! What's your favourite song from her amazing career?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Tomorrow, we celebrate the 80th Birthday of the iconic Linda Ronstadt. Her voice is truly timeless! Which of her hits do you love most?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana!
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana turns 79 on Monday, July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate a true guitar legend! Carlos Santana turns 79 on Monday. What's your go-to Santana track?

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: From Woodstock to world stages, Carlos Santana's guitar has defined generations. Happy 79th Birthday to an icon on Monday!

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Yusuf Islam (Cat Stevens)!
moments.blurb: Singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, widely known as Cat Stevens, celebrates his 78th birthday on Tuesday, July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Legend Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 78th Birthday to the incomparable Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens, on Tuesday! Which of his songs holds a special place for you?

angles.name: Timeless Tunes
angles.copy: From 'Wild World' to 'Father and Son', Cat Stevens' music is truly timeless. Happy 78th Birthday to Yusuf Islam this Tuesday!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley!
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and lead vocalist of the Eagles, turns 79 on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Rock Royalty Birthday
angles.copy: A huge Happy 79th Birthday to Eagles legend Don Henley this Wednesday! What's your favourite song featuring his iconic voice?

angles.name: Eagles Drummer
angles.copy: From 'Hotel California' to his solo hits, Don Henley is a true music titan. Celebrate his 79th Birthday this Wednesday!

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday, Selena Gomez!
moments.blurb: Singer and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on Wednesday, July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Star Birthday
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 34th Birthday to the brilliant Selena Gomez this Wednesday! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Music & Screen
angles.copy: From chart-topping hits to acclaimed acting roles, Selena Gomez truly does it all. Happy 34th Birthday this Wednesday!

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, David Essex!
moments.blurb: British singer, songwriter, and actor David Essex turns 79 on Thursday, July 23rd.

angles.name: British Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the legendary David Essex this Thursday! Which of his classic hits is your favourite?

angles.name: Iconic Voice
angles.copy: From 'Gonna Make You A Star' to 'Hold Me Close', David Essex has given us so many unforgettable songs. Celebrate his 79th Birthday on Thursday!

moments.title: UK School Summer Holidays Begin
moments.blurb: The summer holidays for most schools in England and Wales begin between July 18th and 25th, while Scottish and Northern Irish schools have already broken up.

angles.name: Holiday Kick-off
angles.copy: The school summer holidays are officially starting for many in England and Wales this week! What are your plans for the long break?

angles.name: Family Fun
angles.copy: School's out for summer! If you're in England or Wales, the summer holidays are kicking off this week. Time for family adventures!
